states.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

route.title: This page hit an error
route.description: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page. Try again, or head back to the overview.

content.title: Couldn’t load this view
content.description: Something went wrong while rendering this section. Try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or may have moved.

nav.searchPlaceholder: Search logs — open the LogQL++ editor…

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Paste a Qeet Logs API key with the logs:admin scope to open the console.
signIn.rejected: That API key could not be verified.
signIn.footer: Keys are stored in this browser only and sent as the X-Qeet-Api-Key header. Mint one with POST /v1/admin/api-keys or the seed script.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Ingest health, query activity, open incidents and the changes that may have caused them.
overview.activityDescription: Queries recorded in the tamper-evident audit log, by hour.
overview.activityEmptyDescription: Run a query from Log Search to populate the audit trail.
overview.incidentsEmptyDescription: Incident intelligence correlates errors into incidents as they arrive.
overview.changesDescription: Deploys and config changes overlaid on your logs.
overview.changesEmptyDescription: Connect a deploy source to see change markers on incidents and charts.

incidents.title: Incidents
incidents.description: Correlated error clusters, root-cause analysis, deploy culprits and business impact.
incidents.emptyDescription: Incident intelligence groups related errors into incidents. When one opens, it appears here with RCA and change correlation.
incidents.rcaEmptyDescription: Root-cause analysis will appear once enough correlated signal is collected for this service.
incidents.deploysEmptyDescription: Deploys around the incident window are ranked by how strongly they correlate with the error spike.
incidents.businessEmptyDescription: Business impact (affected customers, revenue, SLA) is joined from your business-context mappings.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Scoped keys resolve to this tenant. The raw secret is shown once at creation and never again.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create a scoped key to authenticate ingest agents, dashboards or the console itself.
apiKeys.revokeDescription: Any client using this key will start receiving 401s immediately. This cannot be undone.
apiKeys.createDescription: Pick a name and the scopes this key may use.
apiKeys.revealDescription: This is the only time the full secret is shown. Store it somewhere safe.

alerts.title: Alert Rules
alerts.description: Threshold and absence rules evaluated by the alerter engine; matches notify the configured channels.
alerts.emptyDescription: Create a threshold or absence rule to get notified when your logs cross a limit.
alerts.deleteDescription: This alert rule will stop evaluating immediately.
alerts.createDescription: Threshold rules fire when a count crosses a limit; absence rules fire when expected logs stop arriving.

changes.title: Changes
changes.description: Every deploy, config edit and feature-flag flip — the change stream correlated against your incidents.
changes.emptyDescription: Wire a deploy webhook or CI hook to stream change markers into Qeet Logs.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: TTFIQ — time to first insight/query: how fast an operator gets from a log arriving to an answer.
analytics.emptyDescription: TTFIQ percentiles populate as queries and incidents accumulate for the tenant.
analytics.seriesDescription: p50 and p90 latency to first insight, by bucket.
analytics.noSeries: No time series available for this period.

topology.title: Service Topology
topology.description: Service dependency map inferred from trace and log correlation, coloured by health.
topology.emptyDescription: The service graph builds up as correlated request/response logs are ingested across services.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: A unified chronology of incidents, deploys, alerts and config changes across your services.
timeline.emptyDescription: Incidents, deploys and alerts appear here in order as they happen.

dashboards.title: Dashboards
dashboards.description: Saved panel layouts of LogQL++ charts and tables for the tenant.
dashboards.emptyDescription: Compose charts and tables into a saved dashboard for at-a-glance monitoring.
dashboards.createDescription: Name the dashboard and optionally seed its panel layout as JSON.

search.title: Log Search
search.description: Run LogQL++ against ClickHouse for the current tenant. Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to execute.
search.runHint: Press <kbd>⌘</kbd> <kbd>↵</kbd> to run. TAIL queries stream from the Live Tail page.
search.prompt: Enter a query above and press Run to see results.
search.saveDescription: Store this LogQL++ statement so the team can re-run it from Saved Searches.

savedSearches.title: Saved Searches
savedSearches.description: Reusable LogQL++ statements the team can re-run from Log Search in one click.
savedSearches.emptyDescription: Save a query from Log Search to pin it here for the whole tenant.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Tamper-evident record of every query and admin action for this tenant.
audit.emptyDescription: Actions and queries appear here as they happen.

tail.title: Live Tail
tail.description: Stream matching records in real time over a WebSocket. Uses a TAIL LogQL++ statement — no ClickHouse scan.
tail.waitingDescription: New records for the current tenant appear here as they are ingested.
tail.notStreamingDescription: Enter a TAIL statement and press Start to open the stream.

export.title: Export
export.description: Run a LogQL++ statement and stream the full result set to a file for the current tenant.
export.cardDescription: Exports honour tenant isolation and your retention window. Large exports stream server-side.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Per-tenant retention window and the PII transforms applied at ingest time.
settings.retentionDescription: Logs older than this window are dropped by the TTL policy. Range 1–3650 days.
settings.transformsDescription: Field → action applied by the synchronous PII gate before logs reach ClickHouse.
settings.noRules: No masking rules. Add one to redact, hash, mask or drop a field.

postmortems.title: Postmortems
postmortems.description: Incident writeups with a one-click CERT-In (Indian 6-hour incident reporting) export.
postmortems.emptyDescription: Write up a resolved incident to capture the timeline, root cause and follow-ups.
postmortems.createDescription: Capture the writeup for a resolved incident.
postmortems.summaryPlaceholder: What happened, impact, root cause, and follow-up actions.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Deliver incident, alert and deploy events to your own endpoints (Slack relays, PagerDuty, custom).
webhooks.emptyDescription: Register an endpoint to receive Qeet Logs events as signed JSON payloads.
webhooks.createDescription: We POST a signed JSON payload to this URL for each subscribed event.

businessContext.title: Business Context
businessContext.description: Map services to their business owner, tier and revenue so incidents surface real-world impact.
businessContext.emptyDescription: Add a mapping to enrich incidents with affected revenue, owning team and service tier.
businessContext.dialogDescription: Describe what a service means to the business.
businessContext.descriptionPlaceholder: Handles order checkout and payment capture.
